headline: Conagra’s 10% Dividend Looks Enticing. Why Income Investors Might Want to Stay Away.
summary: Conagra Brands’ new CEO inherits slowing growth, heavy debt and the S&P 500’s highest dividend yield, leaving investors increasingly focused on whether the payout will be cut.

headline: The Hidden Danger Lurking in Some High-Yield Dividend Stocks
summary: I used to focus on 10% yields, but I found out the hard way that you need to fully understand the risks you face before you buy.
